sections.paragraph:
- Original: κυκλόω

- Transliteration: Kukloo

- Phonetic: koo-klo'-o

- Definition:

1. to go around, lead around

2. to surround, encircle, encompass

a. of persons standing around

b. of besiegers

- Origin: from the same as G2945

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From the same as G2945; to encircle that is surround: - compass (about) come (stand) round about.
